outputs: labels: (N,) compartment id per cell, contiguous from 0

name: MoE-style flow routing (argmax cosine gate)

math: score_i = (o · mean_v_i)/(||o|| ||mean_v_i||), 0 if either norm < 1e-12; route = (argmax_i score_i) compartment, ties → lowest index
